title: senna tora var. obtusifolia
intro: Senna tora var. obtusifolia, also known as Chirayata or Amrita, is a plant-based medicine derived from the leaves of the Cassia tora plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Senna tora var. obtusifolia include relief from fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Senna tora var. obtusifolia is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and can also be used in the form of capsules or tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
